meaning: Telegraph Agency of Soviet Union 苏联塔斯通讯社
examples: For early HCC, if we have a choice of radio frequency or TASS, which do you believe is the best choice?
Tass: Quintessence held in a physical object. Such an object can be used for barter, or to power magical effects.
A local official told Tass news agency that the liquid came in bottles whose labels said the content was 93% spirit.
Russian Emergencies Minister Vladimir Puchkov has said the flood's cause was "not technical, " according to Itar-Tass.
Chelyabinsk Gov. Mikhail Yurevich promised compensation to all those affected, the official Itar-Tass news agency said.
